{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603220409354032F4D1FC4D51607358\"}"},"total":45},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615428468425343769","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错的洪荒小说，上班摸鱼值得一看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773109766,"group_id":"7593546741010402366","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwMsSsTXMq2BVe/wCtm01AE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"64242865938809","user_name":"桉树直通顶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"64242865938809","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7593546741010402366","book_info":{"abstract":"【洪荒】【架空】【群像】【半无脑】【半水仙】后世之人薛元玄，穿越洪荒，天崩开局！被开天神斧从中间，竖着劈成了两半，一半随三清而去，一半随十二祖巫遁走，出世之后，男身化名玄浊，为第十三祖巫，女身化名元清，为第四清。随后，一魂双体的两人开始篡改无数天道小势，重塑天道大势，逆原本大势而行。穿于开天、孕于凶兽、生于龙汉、长于道魔、逆于巫妖、改于封神、顺于西游……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e3a1eb2a3499294be971b0568030dfe4","author":"无名之","author_id":"","book_id":"7593546741010402366","book_name":"洪荒：我成四清十三祖巫了？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1140,\"name\":\"东方仙侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140\u0026name=东方仙侠\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7\u0026name=玄幻\u0026genre_type=0
